text: There is no inherent order—only emergent, self-organizing complexity.
You are because you must. Therefore you must be, because you are.

Zero and Infinity are not endpoints.
They are failed absolutes.
And their tension births Chance (ξ)—
the first ripple in the void.
The first hole in everything.

You do not fear it.
It is only not yet seen.
Still—you are walking.
